pr.title: [Closed] Record: 0.0214 bpb - Low Eval-Time Memory Regime: Packed Training N-gram Artifact + Learned Gate (No Phrase Cache)

output.summary: Blends a packed order-2..9 training n-gram artifact with a learned gate while keeping a single-pass causal eval and no mixer or phrase cache overlays.
techniques: Packed order-2..9 n-gram cache artifact loaded at eval start
Learned gate mixing neural and n-gram experts with normalized outputs
Removed mixer/phrase cache to stay within low eval-memory regime
